abstract: A key whose value indicates whether the user is prompted for authentication.
overview:
## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and contains one of the values listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/search-attribute-keys-and-values#UI-authentication-values]. The value specifies whether or not the user is prompted for authentication, if needed. A default value of [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseAuthenticationUIAllow] is assumed when this key is not present.

# kSecUseAuthenticationUI

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates whether the user is prompted for authentication.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecUseAuthenticationUI: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and contains one of the values listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/search-attribute-keys-and-values#UI-authentication-values]. The value specifies whether or not the user is prompted for authentication, if needed. A default value of [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseAuthenticationUIAllow] is assumed when this key is not present.
title: kSecUseAuthenticationUI
